canonical.title: Unique girlfriend birthday gifts 2026 — one-page decision brief

sources.title: Songfinch — Custom Songs
sources.claim: Studio-recorded original written by a working musician from your brief; she opens it in a digital card

sources.title: PetDecorArt — Dog portrait cost 2026
sources.claim: Hand-painted rendering of her pet or a meaningful location; one-of-one object that ages into an heirloom

sources.title: Fly Away Ballooning — Gift Vouchers
sources.claim: Unusual sensory memory, not a thing to store; 1–2 year validity removes scheduling pressure

sources.title: The Night Sky — Custom Star Map
sources.claim: Custom star map of a meaningful date; $30–$120; 3–10 days print + ship

sources.title: Songful — Songfinch cost guide
sources.claim: $199 base; +$25–$75 for rush delivery; 7 days standard, 4 days minimum

sources.title: PawFav — Custom pet portrait pricing
sources.claim: Digital $40–$75; watercolour $100–$200; oil $150–$300+; premium artists $1,000+; 2–8 wk waitlists

sources.title: Natural Niche Perfume — Custom Perfume
sources.claim: Perfumer interviews her or works from a brief; €240 entry (AbdesSalaam Attar)

sources.title: Tinggly — Experience gifts for girlfriend
sources.claim: Shared-skill learning beats consumables; $60–$300 per couple

sources.title: British Museum — Out-of-hours tours
sources.claim: £35/pp British Museum out-of-hours; private access framing

sources.title: Private Museum Tours — Before-hours tours
sources.claim: Met before-hours from ~$387; MoMA private after-hours $1,000–$1,400 minimum
